import torch
from torch.utils.data import Dataset


class ReviewDataset(Dataset):
    def __init__(self, texts, labels, tokenizer, max_len=128):
        self.texts = texts
        self.labels = labels
        self.tokenizer = tokenizer
        self.max_len = max_len

    def __len__(self):
        return len(self.texts)

    def __getitem__(self, idx):
        encoding = self.tokenizer(
            self.texts[idx], max_length=self.max_len, padding="max_length", truncation=True, return_tensors="pt"
        )
        return encoding["input_ids"].squeeze(), encoding["attention_mask"].squeeze(), self.labels[idx]


def train_model(dataset, model, optimizer, epochs=5):
    for epoch in range(epochs):
        for i in range(0, len(dataset), 32):
            batch_texts = []
            batch_labels = []
            for j in range(i, min(i + 32, len(dataset))):
                input_ids, mask, label = dataset[j]
                batch_texts.append((input_ids, mask))
                batch_labels.append(label)
            input_ids = torch.stack([t[0] for t in batch_texts])
            masks = torch.stack([t[1] for t in batch_texts])
            labels = torch.tensor(batch_labels)
            outputs = model(input_ids, attention_mask=masks)
            loss = torch.nn.functional.cross_entropy(outputs, labels)
            loss.backward()
            optimizer.step()
            optimizer.zero_grad()
